steps.title: Make the lines parallel
steps.content:
For no solution, the two lines must be parallel and distinct. The $x$-coefficient changes from $6$ to $-3$, so the scale factor is $-\frac{1}{2}$. Apply that to the $y$-coefficient.
$$-18(-\frac{1}{2})=9$$

steps.title: Check the constants
steps.content: The constants do not use the same scale factor because $4(-\frac{1}{2})=-2$, not $\frac{3}{2}$. The lines are parallel and distinct. The answer is 9.
